feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1797 201 1596 79
TR 1650 172 1478 64

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.
Ranking App Number of Discounts
1 Hear My Baby Heartbeat App 2.0

  • Price：1

entry.title: Hear My Baby Heartbeat App 2.0
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [Free ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺399,99

Application Description

Trusted by over 500,000 families. The original, best-in-class baby heartbeat app to hear baby heartbeat at home with your iPhone. Looking for a fetal doppler alternative? Hear My Baby uses your iPhone microphone to help you listen to fetal heartbeat sounds — not a doppler or a medical device. HMB 2.0 adds AI chat support, tailored tutorials, and pregnancy reveal videos (+ your heartbeat) to help you get results faster. Why parents choose Hear My Baby Heartbeat App 2.0 - Hear your baby’s heartbeat using the iPhone’s built-in microphone — no accessories required - AI chat support gives step-by-step tips in real time to help you get a result faster - Tailored tutorial adapts to your stage of pregnancy and setup - Create baby sex reveal videos (+ your heartbeat) to share the moment - Record & save heartbeat clips; build a personal timeline you can revisit - Share easily with family and friends (Instagram, WhatsApp, email) - Designed by parents with expertise in sound engineering, AI and app development; warm, honest guidance throughout - Privacy first — you control what’s saved and shared Real 5 Star Reviews "I never leave reviews, let along pay for apps but let’s just say I tried this , and it def works took me a minute to find babies heartbeat but I found her . And to think I almost spent 40 dollars on a monitor today !" - Lov3r_Gurl IG (USA Sept 2025) “I always find the heartbeat eventually and the rhythm is clear and strong. I love that I can record them to keep.” - T Lucker (Australia 2025) "I downloaded this very skeptical... It took me about 45 minutes of laying down, very still, with noise canceling headphones on, but I HEARD HIS HEARTBEAT. I am almost 18 weeks pregnant. From one momma to the next, it’s worth it." - Baby'sHeartbeat (2025) “It took some time and patience... thank you for creating this cheap, awesome technology to use at home.” — Niki “I was skeptical at first. Great app! Worth it.” — Legretta Hear My Baby uses your iPhone’s microphone to listen for abdominal sounds; it’s not a doppler and doesn’t emit ultrasound. It’s a lifestyle keepsake for bonding and sharing, not a medical device and not for diagnosis. Results vary with weeks and baby position (many families hear best from 16+ weeks, clearest around ~27 weeks). If you’re worried at any time in pregnancy, please contact your clinician. For peace of mind, you can use Airplane Mode. How it works (quick start) 1. Find a very quiet room and remove your phone case 2. Place the iPhone microphone on your lower belly and move slowly 3. Our advanced audio engine isolates and amplifies fetal heartbeat sounds so you can listen and save the recording, and trim it to the appropriate moment for sharing quickly and easily. 4. Best from around 16+ weeks; clearest for many families at ~27 weeks. Results vary with baby’s position and placenta location. Tips for best results - Be still, breathe lightly, and try several positions around your bump - Press the mic firmly against the skin; explore low and to the sides - Bluetooth/over-ear headphones can make subtle sounds easier to hear Important Hear My Baby Heartbeat App is not a medical device and doesn’t replace prenatal care. If you’re concerned about anything in your pregnancy, please consult your clinician. Works on iPhone (not iPad). For extra peace of mind, you can switch to Airplane Mode while using the app. Privacy Your moments are yours. You decide what to keep or delete — and who gets to hear them. A word from our team... We never see your recordings, but LOVE to hear them so please tag us on Instagram.com/hearmybaby or TikTok.com/hearmybaby or Facebook.com/hearmybaby

entry.title: Invading Horde - TD
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Starter pack：₺249,99
  • Stars pack 3：₺149,99
  • Stars Pack 2：₺99,99
  • Stars Pack 1：₺49,99
  • Gems pack 3：₺149,99
  • Gems pack 2：₺99,99
  • Gems pack 1：₺49,99

Application Description

An Invading Horde has been spotted to the west of the Kingdom. The King has selected a lucky random subject to defend the Realm. You take on the role of the unfortunate farmer tasked with this great undertaking. Build defensive Towers to defeat the Invading Horde.  Complete levels to earn Stars to upgrade your Weapons, Obstacles and Magic. Earn Gems to unlock more Towers, Obstacles and Magic. Features ● Fast paced Tower Defense action ● Quirky story line ● Pause the action to plan your strategy ● Cast Magic spells to smite the Horde ● Drop Obstacles in the road to slow down the Horde ● Unlock powerful new Towers, Obstacles, Items and Magic

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Alters - Reign Beyond Your Ego
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Alters Pack：₺99,99

Application Description

EVERY SCENARIO IS A NEW LIFE Step into countless lives across an infinite multiverse. Each completed story opens the door to a new existence, transforming you into someone entirely different. A stranded astronaut making critical decisions aboard a failing space station. A renaissance monarch balancing power and betrayal. A modern mob boss walking the line between loyalty and survival. POWERED BY ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE Unlike anything you've experienced before, Alters uses cutting-edge AI to generate unique scenarios, characters, and storylines. Navigate each life until your choices lead to triumph or downfall, then embrace a new destiny in a different reality. MEANINGFUL CHOICES, REAL CONSEQUENCES Every decision shapes your fate. Balance multiple crucial resources as you navigate through challenging situations. Watch as your choices push these measures to their limits - will you maintain harmony, or will one wrong move end your current life? KEY FEATURES: • Endless unique AI-generated scenarios • Deep resource management system • Complete one life to unlock another • Branching narratives that respond to your choices • Stunning minimalist art style • Custom scenario creator (Premium Feature) CRAFT YOUR OWN DESTINY Take control of the multiverse with our premium Custom Scenario Creator. Design your perfect alter ego by defining: • Character background and personality • World details and setting • Custom resources to balance • Unique scenario twists • Special conditions and events DISCOVER YOUR ALTER EGOS Who will you become in your next life? A diplomat navigating alien first contact? A cyberpunk hacker in neon-lit streets? A tribal chief guiding your people through ancient lands? Every completed story unlocks a new beginning. Your choices. Your stories. Your infinite lives. Download Alters now and begin your journey across the multiverse.

entry.title: iVerify Basic
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

iVerify Basic is your gateway to enhanced device security and threat awareness, offering a glimpse into the powerful capabilities of our enterprise-grade solution, iVerify EDR. Designed for individuals who prioritize their digital security, iVerify Basic empowers users to take proactive measures to safeguard their devices against a myriad of threats. Users can scan their devices with a tap to detect vulnerabilities and stay proactive against threats.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Cat Todo：AI & Tasks & Reminder
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺19,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺19,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Jingle：₺149,99
  • 2025 Forest Theme：₺99,99
  • 2025 Lawn Theme：₺129,99
  • 2025 Flower Theme：₺99,99
  • Lawn Theme：₺99,99
  • Toby：₺99,99
  • Gizmo：₺99,99
  • Lucky：₺99,99
  • Loki：₺99,99
  • Civet Theme：₺99,99

Application Description

CatBox Todo is a to-do app loved by cat lovers worldwide. It's a brand-new, minimalist to-do list application featuring lively and adorable cats and themes. Design Concept CatBox aims to provide users with a comfortable experience by having lively kittens accompany them. The cats will perform various daily actions and provide touch feedback, encouraging users like little helpers. The to-do design emphasizes a realistic portrayal of daily life with an ultra-minimalist design, focusing on core functionality and minimizing distractions. Features • Lively Cat Companionship: Cats will vividly accompany you throughout your day, not only encouraging you when you complete tasks but also showcasing fun moments like eating and sleeping, just like your friends. • Clear and Concise To-Dos: Use CatBox Todo to record important matters simply and directly. • Quadrant View for Better Focus: Prioritize and focus on important tasks with the four-quadrant view. • Widget Support with Thematic Changes: CatBox Todo supports the latest widgets and will change along with the chosen theme. • Adorable Cat Skins: Lively and adorable cat skins are available through subscriptions and individual purchases. • iOS 26 Adaptability: Utilizes Apple Intelligence for iOS 26 compatibility. • Apple Intelligence runs entirely on-device, delivering enhanced cat AI while maximizing privacy. Privacy Policy and Terms of Use https://nicolecat.cn/cat/privacy.html https://nicolecat.cn/cat/terms.html Contact Us If you're having fun, please feel free to contact us: support@nicolecat.com

entry.title: 凤凰新闻(专业版)-头条新闻阅读平台
entry.id: 凤凰新闻(专业版)-头条新闻阅读平台-tr-1772160100910
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 218元：₺1.799,99 → ₺1.499,99 [₺1.199,99 ~ ₺1.799,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

In-App Purchases

  • 998元：₺7.999,99
  • 618元：₺4.999,99
  • 488元：₺3.999,99
  • 218元：₺1.499,99
  • 118元：₺999,99
  • 50元：₺399,99
  • 18元：₺149,99
  • 6元：₺39,99

Application Description

【凤凰新闻 给你不同】 1、没有不感兴趣的内容 只推荐和你兴趣相关的新闻和内容，使用时间越长，凤凰新闻越懂你。 2、没有重复信息 通过人工智能推荐技术和大数据算法处理，为你推荐不同的精品资讯。 【凤凰新闻 看到不同】 凤凰忠实记录转型阶段中国社会经济、政治、民主和法制发展进程；详解大陆及两岸三地重要事件，汇集环球新闻资讯，为主流华人提供互联网、移动互联网、视频跨平台整合无缝衔接的新媒体优质内容与服务，秉承凤凰网一贯的中华情怀、全球视野，全力打造全球华人第一移动资讯平台，旨在以真实的力量、独特的视角、敏锐的洞察，带给大家更真的新闻，更丰富的世界，在全球华人圈内广受关注。 【凤凰新闻 就做不同】  1、简约不简单的凤凰头条 24小时全球热点资讯头条不间断播报，为你推荐全球热辣新闻爆料，时政重磅、国际风云、突发热点、社会话题、娱乐头条,每当大事来临，凤凰带您直击事件现场，聚合各方信息，看尽天下风云。    2、百家争鸣凤凰号 大咖、网红、草根组团加盟凤凰号，围观你所熟悉的名嘴一本正经的吐槽调侃。网罗从新闻、头条、热点、微博、体育、娱乐、时尚、财经、IT互联网、国际、军事、汽车、星座、养生、减肥、美容、动漫、历史故事、美食、摄影、旅游、教育、佛学等领域的海量自媒体订阅。你喜欢的，都在这里。 3、频道栏目专属定制 将搜索结果订阅成频道，自己的资讯平台自己做主，每个人的客户端都是独一无二。 4、视频音频支持下载 上下班想看视频苦于没有流量，离线功能让你随时随地观看凤凰精彩新闻视频资讯、收听凤凰好听的声音。 5、精选小说任你畅读 编辑精挑细选百万本图书资源，大量完结、连载、出版小说，同时提供高品质听书资源。涵盖小说类型：武侠、言情、科幻、玄幻、都市、军事、职场励志等。 更多精彩等你来发现... ［联系我们］ 如有任何意见建议、吐槽褒奖，请使用以下几种方式向我们反馈： ［1］“凤凰新闻客户端—意见反馈”； ［2］加入QQ群：397042134。凤凰新闻客户端团队期待您的意见！ ［凤凰新闻自媒体］ 欢迎自媒体人加入凤凰自媒体大趴！ ［1］加入QQ群： 217547818； ［2］入驻地址：http://zmt.ifeng.com。 同时请关注我们的微博、微信账号，获取更多优质新闻内容： ［1］新浪微博用户关注@凤凰新闻客户端，猛料多多，全面开爆。 ［2］微信用户可添加：“凤凰新闻”，获取第一手资讯要闻。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Onyx Magic
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 100 Onyx Credits：₺1.299,99 → ₺999,99 [₺999,99 ~ ₺1.299,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺3.499,99

In-App Purchases

  • 100 Onyx Credits：₺999,99

Application Description

Onyx is a revolutionary new utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data. Using cutting edge AI processing, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera. For example: — Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet. — Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal. — Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought. — Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx, allowing you to zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal. — Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye. — Change the time on a photo of a clock. — Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it seem that it was removed earlier. ...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it. Onyx is particularly great for a reveal within something ephemeral. Take a photo of someone's shadow, a landscape shot of the clouds, a flicker on a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice. * Variable Delayed Input Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken. * Cutting Edge Technology Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely. * Create Unlimited Effects Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took. * Your Integrations. Their Camera The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket. * Invisible, Advanced Technology As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx's advanced technology remains hidden and inconspicuous. * Third Party Integrations Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including: — Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input — Native voice input — WebFX's Wrist Gestures — WikiTest — PeekSmith — Bridge ...and any compatible third-party app. Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits. Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

entry.title: Shot Tracer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺699,99 → ₺299,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺299,99

In-App Purchases

  • Map Subscription：₺49,99
  • Map Tracer & Video Editor Monthly：₺449,99
  • Map Tracer & Video Editor Annual：₺2.499,99
  • Map Tracer & Video Editor Half-Year：₺1.499,99

Application Description

Shot Tracer ® 3D Map Tracer Putt Reading Golf Video Editor Augmented Reality Scorecard Track your golf shots like on TV and turn every swing into stunning content. Shot Tracer® is the ultimate golf tracer, ball flight tracker, and golf video editor, trusted by golfers worldwide and voted Best Golf App by Golf Digest and Golf Magazine. Relive your rounds on a database of 44,000+ 3D golf courses, improve your putting, and create professional-quality golf videos, all on your iPhone and iPad Shot Tracer ® Realistic golf ball flight editor Animate carry, distance, and shot shapes Works on any course, no special hardware required 3D Map Tracer & Course Flyovers Birds eye view of your shots on 45,000+ golf courses Create hole flyovers and shot replays Showcase strategy and shot placement Golf Video Editor (NEW) Create and edit pro-level golf videos directly on your iPhone and iPad Broadcast-style custom scoreboard editor Voice overlays with automatic captions Add custom text, images, and graphics and much more! Professional Scorecard Editor Built-in database with 44,000+ golf course scorecards worldwide Dozens of pro animated scorecard designs ready in seconds Full customization with our new advanced scorecard animation editor AR Green Reading & Putt Line (NEW) Bring broadcast LIV Line technology to your game. Augmented-reality green reading Visual putt lines to understand slope and break Improve putting confidence and green reading skills AR Tracer Fun Mode (NEW) Create fun, engaging golf content with augmented reality. Hit targets, hoops, and challenges Shoot down UFOs in AR Perfect for creative social media clips More Golf Tools Digital scorecard & scoreboard editor 44 000 golf course scorecard database Works on iPhone & iPad Designed for golfers of all skill levels Terms of use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Quakeline
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺9,99 → ₺2,99 [₺2,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺2,99

Application Description

After a devastating earthquake strikes Istanbul, can you find the woman you love? In a fully hand-drawn Istanbul, embark on a journey that tests your instincts and hopes. After the earthquake, you must cross the city — from Bakırköy to Üsküdar — to find the woman you love. Explore a hand-drawn, post-quake Istanbul — from shattered historic neighborhoods to the edge of the Bosphorus. Every corner hides new stories and challenges. In the heart of chaos, survival is not enough. You must do it without losing your honor. On your journey to save your girlfriend, you’ll face not only physical obstacles but also emotional and psychological trials. The people you meet among the ruins—and their stories—will push you to make difficult moral choices. To move forward, you’ll need to solve puzzles, crack safe codes, pick locks, explore devastated locations, and manage your energy wisely. Quakeline is more than just a game; it is a project that aims to raise awareness about the possible impact of a real earthquake in Istanbul. Through its fictional yet grounded narrative, the game invites players to reflect on survival, resilience, and the human spirit. Witness the struggle to survive—and the power of hope. In this unforgettable journey, you’ll not only navigate through debris but also discover the deepest and purest parts of what it means to be human.

entry.title: Border Checkpoint Officer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺9,99 → ₺4,99 [₺4,99 ~ ₺9,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺4,99

Application Description

Border Officer – A Document, Control, and Security Game Every day is a new day at the border. Every day, new faces arrive. Behind every face lies a story, a dream… or a threat. Border Officer puts you at the center of the toughest decisions as a border officer in a document control and security game. You must act according to rules, documents, and presidential orders; the cost of a small mistake can be paid by the entire country. Your Mission • Inspect the documents of incoming characters • Examine stamps and detect forged documents • Scan bags using X-ray screening and find illegal items • Identify and capture wanted criminals • Earn money by making the right decisions Scanning, Searching, and Security Not every bag is innocent. Not every document is valid. Protect the border using scanning and search systems. Maintain security—but do not reject the innocent. Sometimes, the right choice is not to follow the rules. Sometimes, the only right choice is the rules. Consequences of Your Decisions Watch the impact of your decisions in the journalist’s broadcast at the end of each day. Some choices satisfy the public; others push the country toward chaos. The border is yours. The decision is yours. The consequences are ours.
